pipeline.title: 问路与位置 · 中译英

items.zh: 请问，最近的地铁站在哪里？——就在拐角处。
items.answer: Excuse me, where is the nearest subway station? -- Its just around the corner.

items.zh: 我怎么去博物馆？——直走在拐角左转。
items.answer: How do I get to the museum? -- Go straight and turn left at the corner.

pipeline.title: 问路与位置 · 英译中

items.en: Is there a pharmacy near here? -- Yes, theres one across the street.
items.answer: 附近有药店吗？——有的，街对面有一家。

items.en: How far is it from here? -- Its about 10 minutes on foot.
items.answer: 从这里有多远？——走路大约10分钟。

items.en: Am I going the right way to the station? -- Yes, keep going straight.
items.answer: 我去车站的方向对吗？——对，直走。

slots: subway station, bus stop, ATM, restroom, pharmacy, hospital

slotValues.slot1: restrooms, elevators, stairs, exits, lockers, ticket machines

items.answer: How do I get to the museum?

slotValues.slot1: the museum, the airport, the train station, the city center, your hotel

items.answer: Is there a pharmacy near here?

slotValues.slot1: pharmacy, supermarket, post office, park, bank, coffee shop

items.answer: How far is it from here?

slotValues.slot1: the airport, your hotel, the beach, downtown, the hospital

pipeline.title: 问时间与交通 · 中译英

items.zh: 我在哪里买票？——你可以在那边的机器上买。
items.answer: Where do I buy a ticket? -- You can buy one at the machine over there.

items.zh: 这班火车几点发车？——下午3点。
items.answer: What time does this train leave? -- At 3 pm.

items.zh: 去上海的高铁要多久？——大约5小时。
items.answer: How long does the high-speed train to Shanghai take? -- About 5 hours.

pipeline.title: 问时间与交通 · 英译中

items.en: How much does it cost to go to the airport? -- About 120 yuan.
items.answer: 去机场要多少钱？——大约120元。

items.en: What time does the next train leave? -- At 3:30 pm from platform 2.
items.answer: 下一班火车几点发车？——下午3点半，2号站台。

items.en: Where can I buy a ticket? -- You can buy one online or at the station.
items.answer: 我在哪里可以买票？——你可以在网上买或在车站买。

slots: the museum, the store, the bank, the movie, the meeting

pipeline.title: 乘坐公共交通 · 中译英

items.zh: 坐公交车去火车站要多久？——大概30分钟。
items.answer: How long does it take to get to the train station by bus? -- About 30 minutes.
How much is a metro ticket? -- 5 yuan.

items.zh: 这趟车到市中心吗？——到的。
items.answer: Does this bus go to the city center? -- Yes, it does.

pipeline.title: 乘坐公共交通 · 英译中

items.en: Which line goes to the airport? -- Take Line 10 to the end.
items.answer: 哪条线到机场？——坐10号线到终点站。

items.en: Do I need to transfer? -- Yes, change at the next station.
items.answer: 我需要换乘吗？——是的，下一站换乘。

items.en: How many stops to the train station? -- Three stops.
items.answer: 到火车站有几站？——三站。

pipeline.title: 问方向与距离 · 中译英

items.zh: 请问，这附近有银行吗？——有的，就在右边。
items.answer: Excuse me, is there a bank near here? -- Yes, its on the right.

items.zh: 去邮局怎么走？——一直走到红绿灯右转。
items.answer: How do I get to the post office? -- Go straight to the traffic light and turn right.

items.zh: 超市离这里远吗？——不远，拐角就是。
items.answer: Is the supermarket far from here? -- No, its just around the corner.

pipeline.title: 问方向与距离 · 英译中

items.en: Its about two blocks away. -- Is that far? -- No, just 5 minutes walk.
items.answer: 大概两个街区远。——远吗？——不远，走路5分钟。

items.en: How far is the park from here? -- Its only 10 minutes by bike.
items.answer: 公园离这里多远？——骑自行车只要10分钟。

items.en: Is there a pharmacy near here? -- Yes, theres one across the street.
items.answer: 附近有药店吗？——有的，街对面有一家。

pipeline.title: 问方向与距离 · 句型

items.answer: How far is the park from here? -- Its only 5 minutes walk.

pipeline.title: 打车与接送 · 中译英

items.zh: 请帮我打辆车。——好的，马上到。
items.answer: Please call a taxi for me. -- Sure, its coming right away.

items.zh: 去机场打表大概多少钱？——大概150块。
items.answer: How much is it to the airport by meter? -- About 150 yuan.

items.zh: 能帮我拿一下行李吗？——好的，没问题。
items.answer: Can you help me with my luggage? -- Sure, no problem.

pipeline.title: 打车与接送 · 英译中

items.en: How much is a taxi to the airport? -- It depends on traffic.
items.answer: 打车去机场多少钱？——看交通情况。

items.en: Could you put my luggage in the trunk? -- Of course.
items.answer: 能把我的行李放后备箱吗？——当然。

items.en: Please take me to this address. -- Sure, get in please.
items.answer: 请送我到这个地址。——好的，请上车。

pipeline.title: 试穿与尺寸 · 中译英

items.zh: 我想试穿这个。试衣间在哪？——那边，左边。
items.answer: I want to try this on. Where is the fitting room? -- Over there, on the left.

items.zh: 这个有大号的吗？——有的，我给你拿。
items.answer: Do you have this in a large size? -- Yes, let me get one for you.

items.zh: 这个有点小，你们有中号吗？
items.answer: This is a bit small. Do you have medium?

pipeline.title: 试穿与尺寸 · 英译中

items.en: Do you have this in medium? -- Let me check for you.
items.answer: 你们有中号的吗？——我帮你查一下。

items.en: This is too small. Do you have a larger size?
items.answer: 这个太小了。有大一号的吗？

items.en: How does it fit? -- Its a little tight.
items.answer: 穿着怎么样？——有点紧。

pipeline.title: 紧急呼救 · 英译中

items.en: Is everyone okay? -- I think so. One person is a little hurt.
items.answer: 大家都还好吗？——是的，有一个人受了点伤。

pipeline.title: 紧急呼救 · 句型

items.answer: Where is the nearest hospital?
How do I call an ambulance?
Is there a doctor here?
Is everyone okay?

pipeline.title: 问路求助 · 中译英

items.zh: 请帮帮我，我迷路了。——好的，你想去哪？
items.answer: Please help me. Im lost. -- Of course. Where do you want to go?

pipeline.title: 看病问诊 · 中译英

items.zh: 我不舒服。最近的医院在哪？——打车大约10分钟。
items.answer: I dont feel well. Where is the nearest hospital? -- Its about 10 minutes by taxi.

pipeline.title: 看病问诊 · 英译中

items.en: How much does it cost to see a doctor here? -- The consultation fee is about 200 yuan.
items.answer: 在这里看医生多少钱？——挂号费大约200元。

pipeline.title: 看病问诊 · 句型

items.answer: What do I do? I have a bad headache.

items.answer: Do I need to see a doctor?

pipeline.title: 丢失物品 · 中译英

items.zh: 最近的医院在哪？——大约3公里远。
items.answer: Where is the nearest hospital? -- Its about 3 kilometers from here.
